basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 40 years who possess BAMS qualification are eligible to apply for these Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) vacancies. The online application process for AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) Recruitment 2026 has sta

qualification.details: Project Research Scientist – II (Medical): Essential: 1. BAMS with three years of post-qualification experience. OR 2. BAMS with a postgraduate degree or any equivalent degree, including integrated postgraduate degrees. OR 3. BAMS with a PhD. Desirable: Prior experience in conducting or coordinating clinical trials; knowledge/certification in GCP guidelines; candidates with higher qualifications will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist – II (Medical): ₹80,000/- + HRA (10% = ₹8,000) Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) position is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification is a BAMS degree with three years of post-qualification experience, or a BAMS with a postgraduate degree, or a BAMS with a PhD. Desirable qualifications include experience in clinical trials and GCP guidelines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month, plus HRA (10% which amounts to Rs. 8,000/-).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) post at AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories, indicating it might be nil.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) position is contractual.
